original: textify(Ee||(Ee=(0,Ce.Z)([" [var0 |You wander over to Syri’s quarters and, taking note of a paper sign taped to it that says “LIVE ON AIR,” give a quiet knock before poking your head in. Syri waves then taps her headset. “Oooookay, guys, I’m gonna take a quick break here. Enjoy some nice ads while I’m gone, ‘kay?” She quickly fiddles with a few settings on her Codex before sighing and pulling her headset off, shaking her hair out with a smile. “What’s up, [syri.isLover |lover |captain ]?” |You wander over to Syri’s quarters, giving a knock on the door to announce yourself. You hear the clatter of a headset being tossed before she comes to the door and lets you in, greeting you with [syri.isLover |a kiss |a big hug ]. “Hey, [syri.isLover |lover |cap ]. What’s up?” ] "]))),[function(){return betweenHours(12,20)}]
